ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main referee for the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Current status of the game (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Color of the team (e.g., Light, Dark) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., 'Forward', 'Defenseman', 'Goalie') */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the player is from */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Preferred shooting side (e.g., 'Left', 'Right') */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Preferred throwing side (e.g., 'Left', 'Right') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., 'shot', 'goal', 'penalty') */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event (can be NULL for team events) */,
  "assisting_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player assisting in the event (can be NULL) */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video clip of the event */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., 'Power Play', 'Shorthanded') */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the game during which the event occurred */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the teams during the event (e.g., 'Even Strength', 'Power Play', 'Shorthanded') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_assisting_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("assisting_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tracking" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the tracking record belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being tracked */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the game */,
  "x_ft" REAL /* x-coordinate of the player's location on the ice (in feet) */,
  "y_ft" REAL /* y-coordinate of the player's location on the ice (in feet) */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Frame ID (to associate with video feed) */,
  "game_seconds" INTEGER /* Game seconds (to associate with game events) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the tracking record */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the player in feet per second */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction the player is moving (e.g., 'North', 'South') */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the player in feet per second squared */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered by the player during the tracking period in feet */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the player during the tracking period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tracking_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tracking_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tracking_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)
